metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_2493
metadata.comment:
Rationale: immunogold labelling of GABAC R in retinal Bipolar cell terminals.

19/01/2021 Dnyanada: Immunoreaction product is localised on the presynaptic side (represented by an asterisk). "integral component..." was chosen based on transmembrane topology as represented in G1SEE5 (G1SEE5_RABIT).

A polyclonal antiserum raised against amino acid residues 16-171 of the rat r1 subunit that recognizes the subunits r1, r2, and r3 of the GABAC receptor was used. The antibody used is not paralog-specific.. Experimental description: Rabbit: Retinae of adult New Zealand white rabbits (2.5-3.5 kg) were investigated.
